title: [SV] custom op 'sv.ifdef' invalid kind of attribute specified.
body:
When I ran arc-tests, I met an error as follow:
``` c
make -C boom run
make: Entering directory '/home/phoenix/Downloads/arc-tests/arc-tests/boom'
gzip -dc boom-small.fir.gz > build/small/boom.fir
firtool --ir-hw build/small/boom.fir -o build/small/boom.mlir
arcilator build/small/boom.mlir --state-file=build/small/boom.json -o build/small/boom-arc.ll --mlir-timing --print-debug-info --mlir-pass-statistics --observe-wires=0 --observe-ports=0 --observe-named-values=0 --observe-registers=0 --observe-memories=0
build/small/boom.mlir:3:13: error: custom op 'sv.ifdef' invalid kind of attribute specified
  sv.ifdef  "RANDOMIZE" {
            ^
build/small/boom.mlir:3:25: error: custom op 'sv.ifdef' failed to parse MacroIdentAttr parameter 'ident' which is to be a `::mlir::FlatSymbolRefAttr`
  sv.ifdef  "RANDOMIZE" {
                        ^
===-------------------------------------------------------------------------===
                         ... Execution time report ...
===-------------------------------------------------------------------------===
  Total Execution Time: 0.0426 seconds

  ----Wall Time----  ----Name----
    0.0418 ( 98.0%)  Parse MLIR input
    0.0008 (  2.0%)  Rest
    0.0426 (100.0%)  Total
make: *** [Makefile:42: build/small/boom.json] Error 1
make: Leaving directory '/home/phoenix/Downloads/arc-tests/arc-tests/boom'
```
